description: In this episode of Binance VIP Voices, host Michaela interviews Nikita Fadeev, partner at Fasanara Capital, discussing his journey in the crypto market, the founding of the Quant Group, and the evolution into Fastenera Digital. They explore institutional trading strategies and the upcoming Digital Asset Conference aimed at bridging traditional finance with digital assets.
topic_summary: Michaela hosts Nikita Fadeev to discuss his career in crypto, the founding of the Quant Group, and insights into institutional trading strategies. The episode also highlights the Digital Asset Conference aimed at fostering connections between traditional finance and the digital asset ecosystem [t=370.23].
